summary: Iteration 13 - Major System Overhaul testing complete. All 5 systems verified: (1) Enrollment Chain with demo-first constraint, (2) Financial Logic with charge on class creation, insufficient funds check, duplicate prevention, (3) Smart Dashboard for teacher (Today's/Upcoming/Conducted tabs) and student (Live/Pending Rating/Completed sections), (4) Teacher Rating & Penalty system with star_rating, rating_details, recent_events, (5) Permission-Based Chat with scoped messaging. 21/21 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working.

backend: POST /api/admin/purge-system - Requires admin role (403 for teacher)
POST /api/classes/create - Insufficient funds check (400 when student lacks credits)
GET /api/teacher/dashboard - Returns todays_sessions, upcoming_classes, conducted_classes, star_rating, is_suspended (200)
GET /api/student/dashboard - Returns live_classes, upcoming_classes, completed_classes, pending_rating (200)
GET /api/admin/teacher-ratings - Returns teacher list with rating info (200)
GET /api/chat/contacts - Returns scoped contacts based on role (200)
POST /api/chat/send - Respects permission scoping (403/404 for unauthorized)
GET /api/counsellor/dashboard - Returns teachers list for rating filter (200)
frontend: Admin Dashboard - Operations Center header visible
Admin Dashboard - Financials tab with System Pricing sub-tab
Admin System Pricing - Unified Rates Dashboard with Student Rates and Teacher Rates
Admin System Pricing - Danger Zone with Purge System button
Teacher Dashboard - Rating badge (5.0) visible in header, clickable
Teacher Dashboard - Today's Sessions / Upcoming / Conducted tabs (data-testid: tab-today, tab-upcoming, tab-conducted)
Teacher Dashboard - Rating dialog shows star_rating, rating_details (Avg Feedback, Monthly Cancellations, Bad Feedbacks, Penalty)
Teacher Dashboard - Create Class, Schedule Planner, Wallet, Learning Kit, Complaints buttons
Teacher Dashboard - Chat button in header
Student Dashboard - Locked view when not enrolled with Book Demo button
Student Dashboard - Wallet button visible
Chat Page - Contact list with role badges (A=Admin, T=Teacher, C=Counsellor, S=Student)
Chat Page - Search contacts input
Chat Page - Back button
Chat Page - Message input and send button (when contact selected)
Counsellor Dashboard - Stats cards (Unassigned, Teachers, Active, Rejected, Pending Proofs)
Counsellor Dashboard - Tabs: Available/Active/Rejected/Reassignment
Counsellor Dashboard - Chat link
Counsellor Assignment Modal - Filter by Star Rating (All, 1+, 2+, 3+, 4+, 5+)
Counsellor Assignment Modal - Select Teacher dropdown
Counsellor Assignment Modal - Class Frequency dropdown
Counsellor Assignment Modal - Specific Days input
Counsellor Assignment Modal - Demo Performance Notes textarea

seed_data_creation: Created test accounts: teacher1@kaimera.com, student1@kaimera.com, counsellor1@kaimera.com via admin API

features_verified.enrollment_chain: WORKING - Demo-first constraint enforced in /api/admin/assign-student (400 error if no completed demo)
features_verified.financial_logic_charge_on_creation: WORKING - Credits deducted when teacher creates class, not on acceptance
features_verified.financial_logic_insufficient_funds: WORKING - /api/classes/create returns 400 if student has insufficient credits
features_verified.financial_logic_duplicate_prevention: WORKING - /api/classes/create returns 400 if active class exists for same student-teacher pair
features_verified.teacher_dashboard_tabs: WORKING - Today's Sessions / Upcoming / Conducted tabs with data-testids
features_verified.teacher_rating_badge: WORKING - Star rating badge in header, clickable to show rating dialog
features_verified.teacher_rating_dialog: WORKING - Shows star_rating, rating_details (avg_feedback, monthly_cancellations, bad_feedbacks, penalty), recent_events
features_verified.teacher_cancel_class: WORKING - POST /api/teacher/cancel-class/{id} endpoint exists, records rating event
features_verified.student_dashboard_sections: WORKING - Live/Pending Rating/Upcoming/Completed sections in API response
features_verified.student_rate_class: WORKING - POST /api/student/rate-class endpoint exists, impacts teacher rating
features_verified.chat_permission_scoping: WORKING - Students can only message assigned teacher/counsellor, teachers can only message assigned students
features_verified.counsellor_rating_filter: WORKING - Assignment modal has 0-5 star filter buttons (All, 1+, 2+, 3+, 4+, 5+)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 Major System Overhaul testing complete. All 5 systems verified: (1) Enrollment Chain - demo-first constraint enforced, (2) Financial Logic - charge on class creation, insufficient funds check, duplicate prevention all working, (3) Smart Dashboard - Teacher has Today's/Upcoming/Conducted tabs, Student has Live/Pending Rating/Completed sections, (4) Teacher Rating & Penalty - star_rating, rating_details, recent_events in /api/teacher/my-rating, cancellation records rating event, (5) Permission-Based Chat - 4 endpoints working with scoped messaging. Test accounts created: teacher1@kaimera.com, student1@kaimera.com, counsellor1@kaimera.com (all password123). No bugs found.
